name: Beef Panang
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat. Stir-fry the curry paste until fragrant.
2. Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides.
3. Pour in the coconut milk, fish sauce, sugar, peas, and shredded chili peppers. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the beef is tender.
5. Garnish with additional chili flakes if desired and serve over steamed rice.
